title: Find My Device - Sending Tone - X button
scenario: After playing a tone via Find My Device and dismissing the prompt, tapping the X button stops the sound and returns to the map screen.
steps: 1. Open the Find My Device feature.
2. Tap the Play button to play a tone.
3. Dismiss the 'ok got it' prompt if it appears.
expected: The sound stops and the user is returned to the Find My Device map screen.
